name: beadwork-skills
description: Claude Code skills for beadwork (bw — github.com/jallum/beadwork): walkthroughs explaining what bw is and how seven kinds of users use it through their AI assistants for agent memory and agent-to-agent communication, plus an install skill driven by Claude Code. The user pattern is the same across all seven personas — talk to your agent, and your agent uses bw to remember and communicate.
